products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Compatible with many Dolce Gusto machines

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo's 2025 test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top capsule brands; evidence is fresh (published 2025-03-21).
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
